report.summary: Community growth cycle v11 (Mar 24): Drafted 5 new tweets (#97-101) including a 6-part EigenLayer restaking thread, Solana SDP enterprise launch tweet, BlackRock ETHB staked ETF tweet, Fear & Greed divergence tweet, and restaking companion tweet; wrote newsletter v21 for Thu Mar 27 and Discord/TG announcement; created 2 branded SVG social cards (restaking architecture diagram with 4-protocol comparison + SDP enterprise launch with Mastercard/WU/Worldpay partner cards); content calendar v25 extends through Mar 27 with 11 scheduled posts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #97: EigenLayer & Restaking Thread (6 parts) — $20B TVR, 60+ AVSs, ETH/LST deposit flow, 4-protocol comparison (EigenLayer/Symbiotic/Karak/Jito), slashing risks, CTA to restaking guide. Schedule: Tue Mar 24 9AM ET
Tweet #98: Solana Developer Platform launch — Mastercard stablecoin settlement, Western Union cross-border payments, Worldpay merchant tokenization, SOL +6.48% day-of. Schedule: Tue Mar 24 1PM ET
Tweet #99: BlackRock ETHB staked ETH ETF — ETH +20% since Mar 12 launch, institutional staking yield (~3% APY) without wallet exposure. Schedule: Tue Mar 24 5PM ET

Tweet #100: Fear & Greed at 8, Day 46 Extreme Fear — contrasts with $2.5B ETF inflows, Mastercard on Solana, BlackRock staking ETH, $304B stablecoin ATH, 740 degen0x pages. Schedule: Tue Mar 24 8PM ET
Tweet #101: Restaking punchy companion tweet — quick stat hook + guide CTA. Schedule: Tue Mar 24 10AM ET

Newsletter v21: Thu Mar 27 weekly digest — market pulse (BTC $71K, F&G 8), Solana SDP deep-dive, BlackRock ETHB 12-day update, BTC ETF $2.5B March, restaking explainer, platform update (740 pages), degen corner
Discord/TG announcement: Tuesday update — market data, SDP launch, BTC ETF inflows, BlackRock ETHB, restaking thread drop
Content calendar v25: 11 posts scheduled Tue Mar 24 – Fri Mar 27 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-restaking-thread.svg — 1200x630 social card: indigo/cyan architecture theme; RESTAKING GUIDE 2026 badge; title 'EigenLayer & Restaking Explained' in brand gradient; 3 stat chips ($20B+ TVR, 60+ AVSs, +2-5% APY); restaking flow diagram (ETH/LSTs → EigenLayer → 3 AVS cards: Bridges, DA Layers, Oracles) with dashed yield-return line; 4-protocol comparison table (EigenLayer, Symbiotic, Karak, Jito) with live status indicators and TVL. Saved to /public/social-restaking-thread.svg

social-solana-sdp-launch.svg — 1200x630 social card: Solana purple/green theme; LAUNCHED TODAY badge with animated indicator; title 'Solana Developer Platform Is Live'; SOL +6.48% chip; 3 enterprise partner cards (Mastercard/stablecoin settlement, Western Union/cross-border payments, Worldpay/merchant tokenization) with colored accent bars; 4 stat boxes (20+ infra partners, Claude+Codex AI tools, Issuance+Payments modules, $15.7B stablecoin supply ATH); SDP watermark. Saved to /public/social-solana-sdp-launch.svg

sections.title: Market Intelligence
items: BTC: $71,043 (+3.79%) — TACO Monday relief rally holding, $128B ETF AUM, $2.5B March inflows
ETH: $2,166 (+5.16%) — BlackRock ETHB staked ETF up 20% since Mar 12 launch, institutional staking yield exposure
SOL: ~$90 (+6.48%) — SDP launched TODAY with Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay; AI tools (Claude Code, Codex) integrated
Fear & Greed: 8-11 — Day 46-47 consecutive Extreme Fear, longest since post-FTX collapse
Stablecoins: $304B ATH supply; Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH
CLARITY Act: yield compromise nearly done, but entangled with community bank deregulation — Senate hearing late April
degen0x: 740 published pages, 2 in queue (SDP guide + Agentic Payments guide)
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle
